title: Three out of five for Badgers Rural team
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers rural team was reasonably successful at the Cricket South Africa Rural tournament for coastal provinces in Saldanha last week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers rural team was reasonably successful at the Cricket South Africa Rural tournament for coastal provinces in Saldanha last week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The summarised score cards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers vs EP Grahamstown (50 overs)","html":"Garden Route Badgers vs EP Grahamstown (50 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 128 all out (38.1 overs) (Randy Wesso 45, Blake Linder 28, Jurie Noval 3/40, James Noval 2/27, Lakhanya Sam 3/14, Richard Brotherton 2/1) EP GRAHAMSTOWN 129/7 (26.5 overs) (Brain Upman 51, Cariston Haarhoff 21, Jermaine le Kay 2/16, Anoxolo Kitshini 1/29, Ravin lee Kemmies 1/10, Ricardo Majolla 1/17, Franco Geldenhuys 1/7) EP Grahamstown won by 3 wickets.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 128 all out (38.1 overs) (Randy Wesso 45, Blake Linder 28, Jurie Noval 3/40, James Noval 2/27, Lakhanya Sam 3/14, Richard Brotherton 2/1) EP GRAHAMSTOWN 129/7 (26.5 overs) (Brain Upman 51, Cariston Haarhoff 21, Jermaine le Kay 2/16, Anoxolo Kitshini 1/29, Ravin lee Kemmies 1/10, Ricardo Majolla 1/17, Franco Geldenhuys 1/7) EP Grahamstown won by 3 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 99/4 (Jermaine le Kay 26, Randy Wesso 21, Ravin lee Kemmies 19, Blake Linder 16, T Siqoko 2/44) Garden Route Badgers won by 6 wickets. (Man of the Match – Jermaine le Kay).","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 99/4 (Jermaine le Kay 26, Randy Wesso 21, Ravin lee Kemmies 19, Blake Linder 16, T Siqoko 2/44) Garden Route Badgers won by 6 wickets. (Man of the Match – Jermaine le Kay)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Border Villagers vs Garden Route Badgers (50 overs)","html":"Border Villagers vs Garden Route Badgers (50 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BORDER VILLAGERS 96 all out (31.6 overs) (Avumile Mnci 31, Jermaine le Kay 4/44, Franco Geldenhuys 1/16, Yamkela Xakani 1/21, Blake Linder 1/10, Ravin lee Kemmies 1/4)  T20 games","html":"BORDER VILLAGERS 96 all out (31.6 overs) (Avumile Mnci 31, Jermaine le Kay 4/44, Franco Geldenhuys 1/16, Yamkela Xakani 1/21, Blake Linder 1/10, Ravin lee Kemmies 1/4) T20 games"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EP Midlands vs Garden Route Badgers","html":"EP Midlands vs Garden Route Badgers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 122/7 (20 overs) (Leroi Bredenkamp 45, Franco Geldenhuys 28, L Arries 3/14, D de Jager 2/18) EP MIDLANDS 69 all out (16.1 overs) (C Lewack 29, Tyrique Wessels 3/10, Jermaine le Kay 2/7, Yamkela Xakani 1/1, Darryl Damons 1/7, Ricardo Majola 1/20) Garden Route Badgers won by 53 runs. (Man of the Match – Leroi Bredenkamp).","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 122/7 (20 overs) (Leroi Bredenkamp 45, Franco Geldenhuys 28, L Arries 3/14, D de Jager 2/18) EP MIDLANDS 69 all out (16.1 overs) (C Lewack 29, Tyrique Wessels 3/10, Jermaine le Kay 2/7, Yamkela Xakani 1/1, Darryl Damons 1/7, Ricardo Majola 1/20) Garden Route Badgers won by 53 runs. (Man of the Match – Leroi Bredenkamp)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Rural Badgers consist of (front) Ravin Lee Kemmies; Randy Wesso, Ranwill Claassen (assistant coach), Leroi Bredenkamp (captain), Pieter Stuurman (head coach), Rhupino Plaatjies (vice-captain), Ricardo Majolla, (back) Tyrique Wessels,  Jermaine le Kay, Blake Linder, Anoxolo Kitshini, Franco Geldenhuys, Darryl Damons,  Yamkela Xakani and Bradley Carolus.","html":"The Rural Badgers consist of (front) Ravin Lee Kemmies; Randy Wesso, Ranwill Claassen (assistant coach), Leroi Bredenkamp (captain), Pieter Stuurman (head coach), Rhupino Plaatjies (vice-captain), Ricardo Majolla, (back) Tyrique Wessels, Jermaine le Kay, Blake Linder, Anoxolo Kitshini, Franco Geldenhuys, Darryl Damons, Yamkela Xakani and Bradley Carolus."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers vs Boland","html":"Garden Route Badgers vs Boland "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BOLAND 131/6 (20 overs) (W Abrahim 40, D Smith 20*, Tyrique Wessels 2/29, Anoxolo Kitshini 1/11, Darryl Damons 1/11, Blake Linder 1/28) GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 108/8 (20 overs) (Leroi Bredenkamp 36, Bradley Carolus 22, Blake Linder 17, R Smith 2/17, J Voster 2/24, C Deelman 2/16) Boland won by 23 runs.","html":"BOLAND 131/6 (20 overs) (W Abrahim 40, D Smith 20*, Tyrique Wessels 2/29, Anoxolo Kitshini 1/11, Darryl Damons 1/11, Blake Linder 1/28) GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 108/8 (20 overs) (Leroi Bredenkamp 36, Bradley Carolus 22, Blake Linder 17, R Smith 2/17, J Voster 2/24, C Deelman 2/16) Boland won by 23 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers vs Border","html":"Garden Route Badgers vs Border "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 146/4 (20 overs) (Bradley Carolus 73, Leroi Bredenkamp 35*, Nelson Setimani 1/9, T Siqoko 1/33) BORDER 99 all out (18.5 overs) (Y Mtoba 32, Ricardo Majolla 3/12, Anoxolo Khitshini 2/15, Jermaine le Kay 1/5, Blake Linder 1/20) Garden Route Badgers won by 47 runs. (Man of the Match – Bradley Carolus).","html":"GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS 146/4 (20 overs) (Bradley Carolus 73, Leroi Bredenkamp 35*, Nelson Setimani 1/9, T Siqoko 1/33) BORDER 99 all out (18.5 overs) (Y Mtoba 32, Ricardo Majolla 3/12, Anoxolo Khitshini 2/15, Jermaine le Kay 1/5, Blake Linder 1/20) Garden Route Badgers won by 47 runs. (Man of the Match – Bradley Carolus)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
